summary: Hotel Management System Testing COMPLETE. Comprehensive testing of new HotelEditForm component with 4 tabs (Basic Info, Photos, Ratings, Room Types), room types with bed/view/size/amenities, rate plans with meal plans/refund policies/taxes, and image upload functionality. All backend APIs pass. All frontend features verified working.

issues: React hydration warnings in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' and '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - cosmetic issues from Emergent preview framework, does not affect functionality

tests: test_create_hotel_with_room_types - PASSED (creates hotel with room_types and rate_plans arrays)

critical_code_review_comments: HotelEditForm.jsx is well-structured with proper component separation (ImageUploader, RatePlanEditor, RoomTypeEditor, RatingBreakdownEditor)
Room types correctly use expandable accordion pattern with AnimatePresence for animations
Rate plans nested within room types with proper state management
Image upload uses FormData with proper MIME type validation (JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP) and size limit (10MB)
Hotel model correctly includes room_types array with nested rate_plans
All form fields have proper validation and default values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotel Management system fully tested. HotelEditForm component has 4 tabs (Basic Info, Photos, Ratings, Room Types). Room Types tab allows adding room types with: name, category, bed config, view type, size, max occupancy, amenities, description, photos. Each room type can have multiple Rate Plans with: name, meal plan, price, original price, refund policy, refund deadline, meal details, inclusions, taxes. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/hotels, PUT/DELETE /api/hotels/{id}, POST /api/uploads/hotel-image, POST /api/uploads/room-image. Test user: testuser@example.com / password123. Navigate to Hotels Management via: Login -> scroll to footer -> click 'Backend Admin Dashboard' -> click 'Hotels Management' tab.
